mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, total_price, status, created_at, address, phone, note FROM orders ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, user_id, total_price, status, created_at, address, phone, note FROM orders WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (id, user_id, total_price, status, created_at, address, phone, note) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{totalPrice}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{address}, #{phone}, #{note})
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
